observations: Deploy on Monday 2026-04-06 failed with DB connection timeout
Deploy on Wednesday 2026-04-08 failed with DB connection timeout
Deploy on Friday 2026-04-10 failed with DB connection timeout
pattern: Every deploy attempted in the week of 2026-04-06 failed at the DB connection phase with identical symptoms, across three non-adjacent weekdays
generalization: Something introduced on or before 2026-04-06 is causing every production deploy to fail at DB connection, and the failure is persistent rather than intermittent — the fact that it reproduces on three different weekdays rules out weekly cron jobs, maintenance windows, or day-of-week effects
